product_results.title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro (eSIM only), 128GB, Natural Titanium - Unlocked (Renewed)

authors_reviews.title: excellent phone
authors_reviews.text: Excellent condition phone. I haven’t seen any scratch on screen or back. Battery health is at 86%Arrived as described no issue. thanks
authors_reviews.author: Bob

authors_reviews.title: Phone not as described
authors_reviews.text: Item received was in worst condition then what was advertised as “Excellent” condition. Phone has scratches all over the screen and a scratch on the camera lens. This phone should have been categorized as “acceptable” condition. Not worth the “excellent” pricing I paid for!
authors_reviews.author: Jack N.

authors_reviews.title: Great phone!
authors_reviews.text: Very good quality! There were no scratches on the cameras or the sides or screen. eSIM transferred easily during setup. Battery health was 88% which seems good for a refurb.
authors_reviews.author: Angelo S.
